name: sbom emits an SPDX-format bill of materials when --format spdx is given
command: printf '%s' '{"dependencies":{"lodash":"4.17.21","express":"4.18.0"}}' > package.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/sbom.sh" --root . --format spdx 2>e.txt; grep -q 'format=spdx' e.txt && echo h15-spdx 1>&2
